upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra vAM raTo manojavA iyarti' (f॰7.68.3) preyarti =prakarzeREti
'SrIRAmudAro DaruRo rayIRAM manIzARAM prArpaRaH somagopAH' (f॰10.45.5) prArpaRaH prerakaH arterRyantasya prayogaH
'devo vaH savitA prArpayatu SrezWatamAya karmaRe' (vA॰saM॰1.1)
'apa dvArA matInAM pratnA fRvanti kAravaH' (f॰9.10.6) apafRvanti=vivfRvanti
'' pa yA mAtA~ fRute vrajaM goH' (f0 5456) apArRute'pAvfRoti
'araRyamapArRaM grAmAt' (ni0 929) apArRamapagatam
'tena mA samarAmahi' (aTarva॰11.2.7)
'mA tvayA samarAmahi' (aTarva॰11.2.20) tena tvayA vA mA saNgasmahItyAha arterluNi rUpam
'ftasya yonA samaranta nABayaH' (f॰1.73.1)
'samAranta mamABIzwAH saNkalpAstvayyupAgate' (Bawwi॰8.16) ukto'rTaH '
'daBreBiScitsamftA haMsi BUyasaH' (f॰1.31.6) samftA=samfte=saNgate
'divaH skamBaH samftaH pAti nAkam' (f॰4.13.5)
'samarpayendra mahatA vaDena' (aTarva॰6.66.1) samarpaya=saMyojaya=prahara=kziRu=viDya
'idaM Danurlakzyamime ca bARAH SfRvantu me BUpatayaH sametAH CidreRa yantrasya samarpayaDvaM SarEH SitErvyomacarErdaSArDEH' (BA॰Adi॰185.35).. samarpayaDvam=viDyata
'apare dantavezwezu kumBezu ca kawezu ca SarEH samarpitA nAgAH … …' (BA॰droRa॰90.19).. ukto'rTaH
'sa cintayAno vEdehIM kAmabARasamarpitaH' (rA॰3.55.2) paYja SaraSarAhata ityAha
'deva iva savitA satyaDarmendro na tasTO samare paTInAm' (vA॰saM॰12.66) samare paTInAm=paTivatAM (paTikAnAM) saNgamasTAne
'kaTA na kzoRI rBiyasA samArata' (f0 1541) Bayena kimiti na samaM pradravantItyAha kzoRIH=kzoRyaH tAtsTyAllokA janAH
'samaranta parva' (=parvARi) (f0 4199) samaranta samAranta samagacCanta samaDIyanta samAhitAnyaBavan parvARi aNgAni
'DiyA raTaM na kuliSaH samfRvati' (SAM0 brA0 199) samfRvati samAnayati
'sADurvA yadi vA' sADuH parEreza samarpitaH' (rA0 55219) samarpitaH samprezitaH
'yaTA'kzo'nupAktaH avArcCatyevamavAram' (tE0 saM0 2633-4) avArcCati aDogacCati avAram iti luNyaNi rUpam anupAkto'kftopAYjanaH
'iyaM vE (pfTivI) nirFtiriyaM vEtaM nirarpayati yo nirFcCati' (Sa0 brA0 72 2211) nirFcCati pApamAcarati nirarpayati nIcErgamayati vinASayatItyarTaH
'mA te godatra nirarAma rADasaH' (f0 82116) nirarAma=nirgatA mA BUmetyAha sve rADasi na ABajeti tAtparyArTaH
'mA vo dAtrAnmaruto nirarAma' (f0 75621) ukto'rTaH
'devAntsabrAhmaRAnftvA jihmo lokAnnirFcCati' (aTarva0 12453) nirFcCati=nirgacCati pracyavata ityarTaH
'prARamapAno'nu nyfcCet' (tE0 saM0 646) nyfcCet nirgacCadavastAt
'unno vIrA~ arpaya BezajeBiH' (f0 2334) udarpaya utTitAn gavAnnirgatAn kuru ullAGAn sampAdaya
'aBi kfzRena rajasA dyAmfRoti' (f0 1359) aByfRoti=AsAdayati saviteti SezaH
'anarvA'pratyfto'nyasmin' (ni0 6234) pratyfta ASritaH (iti durgaH)
'araRI pratyfta ene agniH' (ni0 5101) pratyftaH pratigatontarnivizwaH
'mozvanyA~ upAratam' (f0 8513) mopArataM mopagamatam
'yuvaM SiYjAramuSanA upAraTuH' (f0 10407) aByupapattukAmAvupasasfpaTuH
'yadASasA niHSasA'BiSasopArima jAgrato yatsvapantaH' (f0 101643) upArima prAmadAma asKAlizma
'yadasmfti cakfma kiYcidagna upArima caraRe jAtavedaH' (aTarva0 71061) upArtaM luptamakArzma yatkarmAnuzWAne mUQA aBUmetyarTaH
'mopArAma jihvayeyamAnam' (rudram) (aTarva0 11217) mopArAma mA upagacCAma iti sAyaRaH mA viruDAma mA taM rudraM paryavasTizmahi iti kecit sAmpratikAH
